decision.recommended_action: Create finance escalation incident and offer $25 goodwill credit
decision.rationale: Refund has been pending for 12 days; policy threshold is 7 days for proactive escalation.
decision.approval_reason: Low-risk compensation is within auto-approval threshold.
next_best_actions: Notify customer when finance accepts ticket

final_response: Hi Aarav Mehta, I investigated your case and created escalation INC-671CE599. Recommended resolution: Create finance escalation incident and offer $25 goodwill credit. Target SLA: 24 business hours.

events.detail: Classified issue as refund_delay and created execution plan.
Refund has been pending for 12 days; policy threshold is 7 days for proactive escalation.

plan: Approve, execute, verify, and record audit trail

evidence.title: Delayed refund after cancellation
evidence.content: A 12-day pending refund was resolved by creating a finance escalation ticket and offering a 25 USD goodwill credit. Outcome: successful.

evidence.title: Payment gateway reconciliation delay
evidence.content: Refund delayed by gateway reconciliation was routed to payments ops with customer notification. Outcome: successful after verification.

evidence.title: Refund Policy
evidence.content: Refunds pending more than 7 days require proactive investigation. Platinum customers may receive priority handling and a goodwill credit up to 50 USD when delay is company-caused.

evidence.title: Baggage Recovery SOP
evidence.content: Delayed baggage cases require bag-trace creation, airport ops routing, customer updates every 12 hours, and reimbursement review for essentials.

automation_trace.summary: Issue classified and routed by supervisor.

Retrieved 4 policies and similar cases from the knowledge layer.
Low-risk compensation is within auto-approval threshold.
Checked ticket state, policy evidence, and audit readiness.

unique_features: Multi-domain support: refunds, flights, baggage, billing, subscriptions, accounts
